title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.170 - Several shares may be set off together
text:
528.170.  Several shares may be set off together. — It shall be lawful for the court, in rendering judgment of partition, to order and direct that any number of shares be set off together in one parcel, and that the residue be divided among the other parties, according to their several rights.
(RSMo 1939 § 1725) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1561; 1919 § 2009; 1909 § 2573
